query:
SELECT 
  id, awayTeam, homeTeam,
  modelAwayGoals, modelHomeGoals,
  modelTotal, modelAwayPLOdds, modelHomePLOdds,
  modelAwayML, modelHomeML,
  modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds,
  spreadEdge, totalEdge, mlEdge,
  publishedModel
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'NHL' AND gameDate = '2026-03-25'
ORDER BY id;
